message:
Unify icon colors to neutral-600

Use explicit color instead of opacity for consistent grey tones across
all See Also icons and sidebar topic icons. Fix icon components to
accept class prop so styling applies correctly.

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 ---
 // Compass icon for Guides - finding direction through a problem
+const { class: className } = Astro.props;
 ---
 
-<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><polygon points="16.24 7.76 14.12 14.12 7.76 16.24 9.88 9.88 16.24 7.76"></polygon></svg>
+<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class={className}><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><polygon points="16.24 7.76 14.12 14.12 7.76 16.24 9.88 9.88 16.24 7.76"></polygon></svg>
